text: A few things to know before you set out on your journey...
text_joined: A few things to know before you set out on your journey...

text: In this demo, you can play for three hours from the start of the game (as recorded in your saved data file).
text_joined: In this demo, you can play for three hours from the start of the game (as recorded in your saved data file).

text: You can choose your own protagonist, just as in the full version of the game.
text_joined: You can choose your own protagonist, just as in the full version of the game.

text: You will also be able to carry over your saved data and use it in the full game.
text_joined: You will also be able to carry over your saved data and use it in the full game.

text: In this demo, prepare to kick off an expansive adventure spanning across the continent. Happy travels!

text:
Three hours of play time have passed, which brings us to
the end of this demo. But not the end of your adventure—
you can carry your saved data over to the full game to
pick up where you left off!

Meet over thirty travelers and build a town of your own
as you continue the epic saga of the divine rings!

Embark on an adventure of your own creation.
